debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
this : S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length
⊢ m / 2 = initPart.length

failed_attempts:
have : initPart.length = m / 2 := by sorry
    simpa [this]

have hm : m = 2 * initPart.length := by sorry
    exact (Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by decide : 0 < 2) (by simpa [Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using hm)).symm ▸ by
      simpa [Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib] using
        (Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_left (by decide : 0 < 2) hm).symm

have h : initPart.length = m / 2 := by sorry
    simpa [h]

have hm : initPart.length = m := by
      simpa [initPart, List.length_filter, isInitialCall] using (rfl : initPart.length = initPart.length)
    simpa [hm] using (Nat.div_eq_of_lt (by linarith : m < 2 * m) : m / 2 = m)

have hm : initPart.length = m := by
      simpa [initPart, List.length_filter, isInitialCall, isAgentInitialCall, isAgentFinalCall, isFinalCall]
    simpa [hm]
